title: Transforming Time Expressions in Reported Speech
instructions: Transforma las oraciones a estilo indirecto (reported speech) y cambia las 'time expressions' como lo harías en un examen. Comienza con 'John said that'.
translation: John dijo que llamaría a Peter al día siguiente.

sentenceParts.text: I will call Peter tomorrow.

options: John said that he would call Peter the next day.

title: Transforming Time Expressions in Reported Speech
instructions: Transforma las oraciones a estilo indirecto (reported speech) y cambia las 'time expressions' como lo harías en un examen. Comienza con 'John said that'.
translation: John dijo que ella había ido a París el día anterior.

sentenceParts.text: She went to Paris yesterday.

options: John said that she went to Paris the day before.|John said that she had gone to Paris the day before.
